title: WebHooks createUpdate and createSubUpdate
excerpt:
Hi 
I use webhooks createUpdate and createSubUpdate it works. 
How can I get changes delete and edit Updates? 
Thanks, 
Fedor

posts.author: VlasenkoFedor (VlasenkoFedor)

posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @VlasenkoFedor!

As of today we do not have those events ready to be used in the create_webhook mutation.

Cheers,
